name: ComfyUI Starter
description: A starter blueprint for local AI image generation with ComfyUI.

apps.reason: Used to clone and manage open-source AI projects manually.
Required for running Python-based AI tools.
Core local AI image generation workflow tool.
Useful for workflows that process image sequences or video.

config_recommendations: If VRAM is below 8GB, use lightweight workflows.
Place model files on an SSD with enough free space.
Avoid mixing multiple incompatible Python environments.
risk_warnings: Low-VRAM systems are not recommended for heavy image generation models.
StackPilot v0.1 does not install ComfyUI automatically; it only generates a blueprint.
not_recommended: Heavy video generation workflows on GPUs with less than 8GB VRAM.
next_steps: Install dependencies manually from official sources.
Run StackPilot again after installation to verify your environment.
